query:
You are working on the thunderbird/thunderbird-android repository.
The codebase is at version 11.0 (commit: 058c23f6).

## Issue to Resolve

Bump AndroidX Activity
Bump AndroidX Activity to 1.10.1 and replace custom `LocalActivity` by new official `LocalActivity`

See: https://developer.android.com/jetpack/androidx/releases/activity#1.10.1

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `app-k9mail/dependencies/fossReleaseRuntimeClasspath.txt`
- `app-k9mail/dependencies/fullReleaseRuntimeClasspath.txt`
- `app-thunderbird/dependencies/fossBetaRuntimeClasspath.txt`
- `app-thunderbird/dependencies/fossDailyRuntimeClasspath.txt`
- `app-thunderbird/dependencies/fossReleaseRuntimeClasspath.txt`
- `app-thunderbird/dependencies/fullBetaRuntimeClasspath.txt`
- `app-thunderbird/dependencies/fullDailyRuntimeClasspath.txt`
- `app-thunderbird/dependencies/fullReleaseRuntimeClasspath.txt`
- `app-ui-catalog/src/main/java/app/k9mail/ui/catalog/CatalogActivity.kt`
- `config/detekt/detekt.yml`
- `core/ui/compose/common/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/core/ui/compose/common/activity/LocalActivity.kt`
- `feature/account/server/settings/build.gradle.kts`
- `feature/account/server/settings/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/account/server/settings/ui/common/ClientCertificateInput.kt`
- `feature/account/server/settings/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/account/server/settings/ui/common/TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric.kt`
- `feature/funding/googleplay/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/funding/googleplay/ui/contribution/ContributionScreen.kt`
- `feature/launcher/build.gradle.kts`
- `feature/launcher/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/launcher/FeatureLauncherActivity.kt`
- `feature/launcher/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/launcher/navigation/FeatureLauncherNavHost.kt`
- `feature/launcher/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/launcher/ui/FeatureLauncherApp.kt`
- `feature/migration/qrcode/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/migration/qrcode/ui/QrCodeScannerActivity.kt`
- `feature/settings/import/build.gradle.kts`
- `feature/settings/import/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/settings/import/ui/SettingsImportScreen.kt`
- `gradle/libs.versions.toml`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

1→package app.k9mail.feature.settings.import.ui
 2→
 3→import android.os.Bundle
 4→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.PaddingValues
 5→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxSize
 6→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.padding
 7→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
 8→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 9→import androidx.compose.ui.res.stringResource
10→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
11→import androidx.fragment.compose.AndroidFragment
12→import androidx.lifecycle.compose.LocalLifecycleOwner
13→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
14→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.atom.button.ButtonIcon
15→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.atom.icon.Icons
16→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.organism.TopAppBar
17→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.template.Scaffold
18→import app.k9mail.feature.settings.importing.R
19→
20→@Composable
21→fun SettingsImportScreen(
22→    action: SettingsImportAction,
23→    onImportSuccess: () -> Unit,
24→    onBack: () -> Unit,
25→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
26→) {
27→    Scaffold(
28→        topBar = {
29→            TopAppBar(
30→                title = stringResource(R.string.settings_import_title),
31→                navigationIcon = {
32→                    ButtonIcon(
33→                        onClick = onBack,
34→                        imageVector = Icons.Outlined.ArrowBack,
35→                        contentDescription = stringResource(androidx.appcompat.R.string.abc_action_bar_up_description),
36→                    )
37→                },
38→            )
39→        },
40→        modifier = modifier,
41→    ) { innerPadding ->
42→        SettingsImportContent(action, onImportSuccess, onBack, innerPadding)
43→    }
44→}
45→
46→@Composable
47→private fun SettingsImportContent(
48→    action: SettingsImportAction,
49→    onImportSuccess: () -> Unit,
50→    onBack: () -> Unit,
51→    paddingValues: PaddingValues,
52→) {
53→    val activity = LocalActivity.current as FragmentActivity
54→
55→    activity.supportFragmentManager.setFragmentResultListener(
56→        SettingsImportFragment.FRAGMENT_RESULT_KEY,
57→        LocalLifecycleOwner.current,
58→    ) { _, result: Bundle ->
59→        if (result.getBoolean(SettingsImportFragment.FRAGMENT_RESULT_ACCOUNT_IMPORTED, false)) {
60→            onImportSuccess()
61→        } else {
62→            onBack()
63→        }
64→    }
65→
66→    AndroidFragment<SettingsImportFragment>(
67→        arguments = action.toBundle(),
68→        modifier = Modifier
69→            .fillMaxSize()
70→            .padding(paddingValues),
71→    )
72→}
73→

 2→
 3→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxSize
 4→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.safeDrawingPadding
 5→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
 6→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier

10→import app.k9mail.core.ui.theme.api.FeatureThemeProvider

14→@Composable
15→fun FeatureLauncherApp(
16→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
17→    themeProvider: FeatureThemeProvider = koinInject<FeatureThemeProvider>(),
18→) {
19→    val navController = rememberNavController()
20→
21→    themeProvider.WithTheme {
22→        Surface(
23→            modifier = Modifier
24→                .fillMaxSize()
25→                .safeDrawingPadding()
26→                .then(modifier),
27→        ) {
28→            val activity = LocalActivity.current
29→
30→            FeatureLauncherNavHost(
31→                navController = navController,
32→                onBack = { activity.finish() },
33→            )

35→    }
36→}

1→package app.k9mail.feature.launcher.navigation
 2→
 3→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
 4→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 5→import androidx.navigation.NavHostController
 6→import androidx.navigation.compose.NavHost
 7→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
 8→import app.k9mail.feature.account.edit.navigation.accountEditRoute
 9→import app.k9mail.feature.account.setup.navigation.accountSetupRoute
10→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.api.FundingNavigation
11→import app.k9mail.feature.launcher.FeatureLauncherExternalContract.AccountSetupFinishedLauncher
12→import app.k9mail.feature.onboarding.main.navigation.NAVIGATION_ROUTE_ONBOARDING
13→import app.k9mail.feature.onboarding.main.navigation.onboardingRoute
14→import org.koin.compose.koinInject
15→
16→@Composable
17→fun FeatureLauncherNavHost(
18→    navController: NavHostController,
19→    onBack: () -> Unit,
20→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
21→    accountSetupFinishedLauncher: AccountSetupFinishedLauncher = koinInject(),
22→    fundingNavigation: FundingNavigation = koinInject(),
23→) {
24→    val activity = LocalActivity.current
25→
26→    NavHost(
27→        navController = navController,
28→        startDestination = NAVIGATION_ROUTE_ONBOARDING,
29→        modifier = modifier,
30→    ) {
31→        onboardingRoute(
32→            onFinish = { accountUuid ->
33→                accountSetupFinishedLauncher.launch(accountUuid)
34→                activity.finish()
35→            },
36→        )
37→        accountSetupRoute(
38→            onBack = onBack,
39→            onFinish = { accountSetupFinishedLauncher.launch(it) },
40→        )
41→        accountEditRoute(
42→            onBack = onBack,
43→            onFinish = { activity.finish() },
44→        )
45→
46→        fundingNavigation.registerRoutes(
47→            navGraphBuilder = this,
48→            onBack = onBack,
49→            onFinish = { onBack() },
50→        )
51→    }
52→}
53→

 4→import androidx.compose.ui.test.performClick
 5→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity

 7→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.testing.onNodeWithTag
 8→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.testing.pressBack

11→import assertk.assertThat
12→import assertk.assertions.isEqualTo

15→import org.mockito.Mockito.mock
16→
17→internal class ContributionScreenKtTest : ComposeTest() {
18→
19→    @Test
20→    fun `should call onBack when back button is pressed`() = runTest {
21→        val initialState = State()
22→        val viewModel = FakeContributionViewModel(initialState)
23→        var onBackCounter = 0
24→
25→        setContentWithTheme {
26→            CompositionLocalProvider(LocalActivity provides mock()) {
27→                ContributionScreen(
28→                    onBack = { onBackCounter++ },
29→                    viewModel = viewModel,
30→                )
31→            }
32→        }
33→
34→        assertThat(onBackCounter).isEqualTo(0)
35→
36→        pressBack()
37→
38→        assertThat(onBackCounter).isEqualTo(1)
39→
40→        onNodeWithTag("TopAppBarBackButton").performClick()
41→
42→        assertThat(onBackCounter).isEqualTo(2)
43→    }
44→}

conversation_history.name: read
conversation_history.content:
1→package app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.ui.contribution
 2→
 3→import android.content.Intent
 4→import android.net.Uri
 5→import androidx.activity.compose.BackHandler
 6→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
 7→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 8→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
 9→import androidx.compose.ui.res.stringResource
10→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
11→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.mvi.observe
12→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.organism.TopAppBarWithBackButton
13→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.template.Scaffold
14→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.R
15→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.ui.contribution.ContributionContract.ViewModel
16→import org.koin.androidx.compose.koinViewModel
17→
18→@Composable
19→internal fun ContributionScreen(
20→    onBack: () -> Unit,
21→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
22→    viewModel: ViewModel = koinViewModel<ContributionViewModel>(),
23→) {
24→    val activity = LocalActivity.current
25→    val context = LocalContext.current
26→
27→    val (state, dispatch) = viewModel.observe { effect ->
28→        when (effect) {
29→            is ContributionContract.Effect.ManageSubscription -> {
30→                context.startActivity(
31→                    getManageSubscriptionIntent(
32→                        productId = effect.productId,
33→                        packageName = context.packageName,
34→                    ),
35→                )
36→            }
37→
38→            is ContributionContract.Effect.PurchaseContribution -> {
39→                effect.startPurchaseFlow(activity)
40→            }
41→        }
42→    }
43→
44→    BackHandler {
45→        onBack()
46→    }
47→
48→    Scaffold(
49→        modifier = modifier,
50→        topBar = {
51→            TopAppBarWithBackButton(
52→                title = stringResource(R.string.funding_googleplay_contribution_title),
53→                onBackClick = onBack,
54→            )
55→        },
56→    ) { innerPadding ->
57→        ContributionContent(
58→            state = state.value,
59→            onEvent = { dispatch(it) },
60→            contentPadding = innerPadding,
61→        )
62→    }
63→}
64→
65→private const val SUBSCRIPTION_URL = "https://play.google.com/store/account/subscriptions"
66→
67→private fun getManageSubscriptionIntent(
68→    productId: String,
69→    packageName: String,
70→): Intent {
71→    val uri = Uri.parse(SUBSCRIPTION_URL)
72→        .buildUpon()
73→        .appendQueryParameter("sku", productId)
74→        .appendQueryParameter("package", packageName)
75→        .build()
76→
77→    return Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, uri)
78→}
79→

conversation_history.content:
1→package app.k9mail.feature.account.server.settings.ui.common
  2→
  3→import android.view.WindowManager
  4→import androidx.biometric.BiometricManager
  5→import androidx.biometric.BiometricPrompt
  6→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
  7→import androidx.compose.runtime.DisposableEffect
  8→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
  9→import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
 10→import androidx.compose.runtime.saveable.rememberSaveable
 11→import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
 12→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 13→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 14→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
 15→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.atom.textfield.TextFieldOutlinedPassword
 16→
 17→/**
 18→ * Variant of [TextFieldOutlinedPassword] that only allows the password to be unmasked after the user has authenticated
 19→ * using [BiometricPrompt].
 20→ *
 21→ * Note: Due to limitations of [BiometricPrompt] this composable can only be used inside a [FragmentActivity].
 22→ */
 23→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 24→@Composable
 25→fun TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric(
 26→    value: String,
 27→    onValueChange: (String) -> Unit,
 28→    authenticationTitle: String,
 29→    authenticationSubtitle: String,
 30→    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 31→    onWarningChange: (CharSequence?) -> Unit,
 32→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
 33→    label: String? = null,
 34→    isEnabled: Boolean = true,
 35→    isReadOnly: Boolean = false,
 36→    isRequired: Boolean = false,
 37→    hasError: Boolean = false,
 38→) {
 39→    var isPasswordVisible by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 40→    var isAuthenticated by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 41→    var isAuthenticationRequired by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(true) }
 42→
 43→    // If the entire password was removed, we allow the user to unmask the text field without requiring authentication.
 44→    if (value.isEmpty()) {
 45→        isAuthenticationRequired = false
 46→    }
 47→
 48→    val activity = LocalActivity.current as FragmentActivity
 49→
 50→    TextFieldOutlinedPassword(
 51→        value = value,
 52→        onValueChange = onValueChange,
 53→        modifier = modifier,
 54→        label = label,
 55→        isEnabled = isEnabled,
 56→        isReadOnly = isReadOnly,
 57→        isRequired = isRequired,
 58→        hasError = hasError,
 59→        isPasswordVisible = isPasswordVisible,
 60→        onPasswordVisibilityToggleClicked = {
 61→            if (!isAuthenticationRequired || isAuthenticated) {
 62→                isPasswordVisible = !isPasswordVisible
 63→                activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 64→            } else {
 65→                showBiometricPrompt(
 66→                    activity,
 67→                    authenticationTitle,
 68→                    authenticationSubtitle,
 69→                    needScreenLockMessage,
 70→                    onAuthSuccess = {
 71→                        isAuthenticated = true
 72→                        isPasswordVisible = true
 73→                        onWarningChange(null)
 74→                        activity.setSecure(true)
 75→                    },
 76→                    onAuthError = onWarningChange,
 77→                )
 78→            }
 79→        },
 80→    )
 81→
 82→    DisposableEffect(key1 = "secureWindow") {
 83→        activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 84→
 85→        onDispose {
 86→            activity.setSecure(false)
 87→        }
 88→    }
 89→}
 90→
 91→private fun showBiometricPrompt(
 92→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 93→    title: String,
 94→    subtitle: String,
 95→    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 96→    onAuthSuccess: () -> Unit,
 97→    onAuthError: (CharSequence) -> Unit,
 98→) {
 99→    val authenticationCallback = object : BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationCallback() {
100→        override fun onAuthenticationSucceeded(result: BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationResult) {
101→            onAuthSuccess()
102→        }
103→
104→        override fun onAuthenticationError(errorCode: Int, errString: CharSequence) {
105→            if (errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_HW_NOT_PRESENT ||
106→                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_DEVICE_CREDENTIAL ||
107→                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_BIOMETRICS
108→            ) {
109→                onAuthError(needScreenLockMessage)
110→            } else if (errString.isNotEmpty()) {
111→                onAuthError(errString)
112→            }
113→        }
114→    }
115→
116→    val promptInfo = BiometricPrompt.PromptInfo.Builder()
117→        .setAllowedAuthenticators(
118→            BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_STRONG or
119→                BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_WEAK or
120→                BiometricManager.Authenticators.DEVICE_CREDENTIAL,
121→        )
122→        .setTitle(title)
123→        .setSubtitle(subtitle)
124→        .build()
125→
126→    BiometricPrompt(activity, authenticationCallback).authenticate(promptInfo)
127→}
128→
129→private fun FragmentActivity.setSecure(secure: Boolean) {
130→    window.setFlags(if (secure) WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SECURE else 0, WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SECURE)
131→}
132→

16→@Composable

18→    navController: NavHostController,
19→    onBack: () -> Unit,
20→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
21→    accountSetupFinishedLauncher: AccountSetupFinishedLauncher = koinInject(),

34→                activity.finish()
35→            },
36→        )
37→        accountSetupRoute(
38→            onBack = onBack,
39→            onFinish = { accountSetupFinishedLauncher.launch(it) },
40→        )
41→        accountEditRoute(
42→            onBack = onBack,
43→            onFinish = { activity.finish() },
44→        )
45→
46→        fundingNavigation.registerRoutes(
47→            navGraphBuilder = this,
48→            onBack = onBack,
49→            onFinish = { onBack() },
50→        )
51→    }
52→}

1→package app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.ui.contribution
 2→
 3→import android.content.Intent
 4→import android.net.Uri
 5→import androidx.activity.compose.BackHandler
 6→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
 7→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 8→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
 9→import androidx.compose.ui.res.stringResource
10→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
11→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.mvi.observe
12→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.organism.TopAppBarWithBackButton
13→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.template.Scaffold
14→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.R
15→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.ui.contribution.ContributionContract.ViewModel
16→import org.koin.androidx.compose.koinViewModel
17→
18→@Composable
19→internal fun ContributionScreen(
20→    onBack: () -> Unit,
21→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
22→    viewModel: ViewModel = koinViewModel<ContributionViewModel>(),
23→) {
24→    val activity = LocalActivity.current
25→    val context = LocalContext.current
26→
27→    val (state, dispatch) = viewModel.observe { effect ->
28→        when (effect) {
29→            is ContributionContract.Effect.ManageSubscription -> {
30→                context.startActivity(
31→                    getManageSubscriptionIntent(
32→                        productId = effect.productId,
33→                        packageName = context.packageName,
34→                    ),
35→                )
36→            }
37→
38→            is ContributionContract.Effect.PurchaseContribution -> {
39→                effect.startPurchaseFlow(activity)
40→            }
41→        }
42→    }
43→
44→    BackHandler {
45→        onBack()
46→    }
47→
48→    Scaffold(
49→        modifier = modifier,
50→        topBar = {
51→            TopAppBarWithBackButton(
52→                title = stringResource(R.string.funding_googleplay_contribution_title),
53→                onBackClick = onBack,
54→            )
55→        },
56→    ) { innerPadding ->
57→        ContributionContent(
58→            state = state.value,
59→            onEvent = { dispatch(it) },
60→            contentPadding = innerPadding,
61→        )
62→    }
63→}
64→
65→private const val SUBSCRIPTION_URL = "https://play.google.com/store/account/subscriptions"
66→
67→private fun getManageSubscriptionIntent(
68→    productId: String,
69→    packageName: String,
70→): Intent {
71→    val uri = Uri.parse(SUBSCRIPTION_URL)
72→        .buildUpon()
73→        .appendQueryParameter("sku", productId)
74→        .appendQueryParameter("package", packageName)
75→        .build()
76→
77→    return Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, uri)
78→}
79→

1→package app.k9mail.feature.account.server.settings.ui.common
  2→
  3→import android.view.WindowManager
  4→import androidx.biometric.BiometricManager
  5→import androidx.biometric.BiometricPrompt
  6→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
  7→import androidx.compose.runtime.DisposableEffect
  8→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
  9→import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
 10→import androidx.compose.runtime.saveable.rememberSaveable
 11→import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
 12→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 13→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 14→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
 15→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.atom.textfield.TextFieldOutlinedPassword
 16→
 17→/**
 18→ * Variant of [TextFieldOutlinedPassword] that only allows the password to be unmasked after the user has authenticated
 19→ * using [BiometricPrompt].
 20→ *
 21→ * Note: Due to limitations of [BiometricPrompt] this composable can only be used inside a [FragmentActivity].
 22→ */
 23→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 24→@Composable
 25→fun TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric(
 26→    value: String,
 27→    onValueChange: (String) -> Unit,
 28→    authenticationTitle: String,
 29→    authenticationSubtitle: String,
 30→    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 31→    onWarningChange: (CharSequence?) -> Unit,
 32→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
 33→    label: String? = null,
 34→    isEnabled: Boolean = true,
 35→    isReadOnly: Boolean = false,
 36→    isRequired: Boolean = false,
 37→    hasError: Boolean = false,
 38→) {
 39→    var isPasswordVisible by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 40→    var isAuthenticated by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 41→    var isAuthenticationRequired by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(true) }
 42→
 43→    // If the entire password was removed, we allow the user to unmask the text field without requiring authentication.
 44→    if (value.isEmpty()) {
 45→        isAuthenticationRequired = false
 46→    }
 47→
 48→    val activity = LocalActivity.current as FragmentActivity
 49→
 50→    TextFieldOutlinedPassword(
 51→        value = value,
 52→        onValueChange = onValueChange,
 53→        modifier = modifier,
 54→        label = label,
 55→        isEnabled = isEnabled,
 56→        isReadOnly = isReadOnly,
 57→        isRequired = isRequired,
 58→        hasError = hasError,
 59→        isPasswordVisible = isPasswordVisible,
 60→        onPasswordVisibilityToggleClicked = {
 61→            if (!isAuthenticationRequired || isAuthenticated) {
 62→                isPasswordVisible = !isPasswordVisible
 63→                activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 64→            } else {
 65→                showBiometricPrompt(
 66→                    activity,
 67→                    authenticationTitle,
 68→                    authenticationSubtitle,
 69→                    needScreenLockMessage,
 70→                    onAuthSuccess = {
 71→                        isAuthenticated = true
 72→                        isPasswordVisible = true
 73→                        onWarningChange(null)
 74→                        activity.setSecure(true)
 75→                    },
 76→                    onAuthError = onWarningChange,
 77→                )
 78→            }
 79→        },
 80→    )
 81→
 82→    DisposableEffect(key1 = "secureWindow") {
 83→        activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 84→
 85→        onDispose {
 86→            activity.setSecure(false)
 87→        }
 88→    }
 89→}
 90→
 91→private fun showBiometricPrompt(
 92→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 93→    title: String,
 94→    subtitle: String,
 95→    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 96→    onAuthSuccess: () -> Unit,
 97→    onAuthError: (CharSequence) -> Unit,
 98→) {
 99→    val authenticationCallback = object : BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationCallback() {
100→        override fun onAuthenticationSucceeded(result: BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationResult) {
101→            onAuthSuccess()
102→        }
103→
104→        override fun onAuthenticationError(errorCode: Int, errString: CharSequence) {
105→            if (errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_HW_NOT_PRESENT ||
106→                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_DEVICE_CREDENTIAL ||
107→                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_BIOMETRICS
108→            ) {
109→                onAuthError(needScreenLockMessage)
110→            } else if (errString.isNotEmpty()) {
111→                onAuthError(errString)
112→            }
113→        }
114→    }
115→
116→    val promptInfo = BiometricPrompt.PromptInfo.Builder()
117→        .setAllowedAuthenticators(
118→            BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_STRONG or
119→                BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_WEAK or
120→                BiometricManager.Authenticators.DEVICE_CREDENTIAL,
121→        )
122→        .setTitle(title)
123→        .setSubtitle(subtitle)
124→        .build()
125→
126→    BiometricPrompt(activity, authenticationCallback).authenticate(promptInfo)
127→}
128→
129→private fun FragmentActivity.setSecure(secure: Boolean) {
130→    window.setFlags(if (secure) WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SECURE else 0, WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SECURE)
131→}
132→

20→@Composable
21→fun SettingsImportScreen(
22→    action: SettingsImportAction,
23→    onImportSuccess: () -> Unit,
24→    onBack: () -> Unit,
25→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
26→) {
27→    Scaffold(
28→        topBar = {
29→            TopAppBar(
30→                title = stringResource(R.string.settings_import_title),
31→                navigationIcon = {
32→                    ButtonIcon(
33→                        onClick = onBack,
34→                        imageVector = Icons.Outlined.ArrowBack,
35→                        contentDescription = stringResource(androidx.appcompat.R.string.abc_action_bar_up_description),
36→                    )
37→                },
38→            )
39→        },
40→        modifier = modifier,
41→    ) { innerPadding ->
42→        SettingsImportContent(action, onImportSuccess, onBack, innerPadding)
43→    }
44→}
45→
46→@Composable
47→private fun SettingsImportContent(
48→    action: SettingsImportAction,
49→    onImportSuccess: () -> Unit,
50→    onBack: () -> Unit,
51→    paddingValues: PaddingValues,
52→) {
53→    val activity = LocalActivity.current as FragmentActivity
54→
55→    activity.supportFragmentManager.setFragmentResultListener(
56→        SettingsImportFragment.FRAGMENT_RESULT_KEY,
57→        LocalLifecycleOwner.current,
58→    ) { _, result: Bundle ->
59→        if (result.getBoolean(SettingsImportFragment.FRAGMENT_RESULT_ACCOUNT_IMPORTED, false)) {
60→            onImportSuccess()
61→        } else {
62→            onBack()
63→        }
64→    }
65→
66→    AndroidFragment<SettingsImportFragment>(
67→        arguments = action.toBundle(),
68→        modifier = Modifier
69→            .fillMaxSize()
70→            .padding(paddingValues),
71→    )
72→}
73→

 2→
 3→import androidx.compose.runtime.CompositionLocalProvider
 4→import androidx.compose.ui.test.performClick
 5→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
 6→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.testing.ComposeTest
 7→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.testing.onNodeWithTag
 8→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.testing.pressBack
 9→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.testing.setContentWithTheme
10→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.ui.contribution.ContributionContract.State
11→import assertk.assertThat
12→import assertk.assertions.isEqualTo
13→import kotlin.test.Test
14→import kotlinx.coroutines.test.runTest
15→import org.mockito.Mockito.mock
16→
17→internal class ContributionScreenKtTest : ComposeTest() {
18→
19→    @Test
20→    fun `should call onBack when back button is pressed`() = runTest {
21→        val initialState = State()
22→        val viewModel = FakeContributionViewModel(initialState)
23→        var onBackCounter = 0
24→
25→        setContentWithTheme {
26→            CompositionLocalProvider(LocalActivity provides mock()) {
27→                ContributionScreen(
28→                    onBack = { onBackCounter++ },
29→                    viewModel = viewModel,
30→                )
31→            }
32→        }
33→
34→        assertThat(onBackCounter).isEqualTo(0)
35→
36→        pressBack()
37→
38→        assertThat(onBackCounter).isEqualTo(1)
39→
40→        onNodeWithTag("TopAppBarBackButton").performClick()
41→
42→        assertThat(onBackCounter).isEqualTo(2)
43→    }
44→}
